<!--
This repository does not accept pull requests.

The GitHub repository is a read-only mirror that is rewritten on every
release sync; any merge here would be overwritten. Please close this PR.

To contribute the change instead:

1. Open a GitHub issue describing the problem or proposal.
2. Attach your changes as a `git format-patch` patch or an inline diff in
   the issue body.
3. Include `Signed-off-by: Your Name <email@example.com>` per CONTRIBUTING.md.

Thanks for the interest.
-->

## This repository does not accept pull requests

The GitHub copy is a one-way mirror of the maintainer's private development
branch. Every release sync rewrites this branch with a fresh root commit, so
merged PRs would be lost.

**Please close this PR and [open an issue](../../issues/new) instead** with
your patch attached (or inline diff). See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
for the full contribution flow.
